headline: Morgan Stanley Remains Bullish on UnitedHealth (UNH) Amid Sector Recovery
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is included among the Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 4, Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price recommendation on UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) to $453 from $395. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. Analyst Erin Wright noted that managed care stocks have been “grinding higher” […]
